Notes: USF snaps  six-game losing skid vs Concordia- St. Paul, earns #5 seed in
NSIC Tournament and will play at St. Cloud State; Concordia earns #6 seed
in NSIC Tournament and will play at Minn. Crookston on Feb 25 at 7pm
Concordia's Anika Whiting ties career-high with 33 points
Game.Officials: Bryan Ryken,  Jon Garrow,  Amy Hupke
